assumptions.note: Token estimates are approximate; measure with your tokenizer for deployment.

prefill_optimization.strategy: Group by doc_id; prefill context once, append question per query (KV cache / prefix cache).

decode_optimization.note: Answers are short (mean << context). Budget GPU for prefill; decode is cheap.

prompt_structure.static_vs_dynamic: LOW_REUSE: each row has distinct long `input` — full prefill per example.

prefill_optimization.recommended: No shared prefix; use sliding window / LongLoRA / sparse attention per doc.

decode_optimization.note: Many Exam tasks have tiny `outputs` (e.g. gsm100) — optimize prefill latency, not max_tokens.

prompt_structure.static_vs_dynamic: LOW_REUSE: each row has distinct long `input` — full prefill per example.

prefill_optimization.recommended: No shared prefix; use sliding window / LongLoRA / sparse attention per doc.

decode_optimization.note: Many Exam tasks have tiny `outputs` (e.g. gsm100) — optimize prefill latency, not max_tokens.

prompt_structure.static_vs_dynamic: HIGH_REUSE: entire `input` identical — cache one prefill, swap `instructions` only.

prefill_optimization.recommended: Prefix-cache `input`; batch queries with same few-shot block.

decode_optimization.note: Many Exam tasks have tiny `outputs` (e.g. gsm100) — optimize prefill latency, not max_tokens.

reuse_for_inference.loogle_doc_grouping: Same doc_id → identical context. Prefill savings 0%–95% if you cache KV per document and run multiple questions.
reuse_for_inference.leval_fewshot_prefix_cache: Full shared `input` block in: ['LEval/Exam/gsm100.jsonl']. Use prefix caching / continuous batching with static system+few-shot.

inference_budget_priority: 1. Prefill dominates (context >> answer). Optimize: FlashAttention, chunked prefill, prefix/KV reuse.
2. LooGLE: schedule by doc_id (≈8–19 questions per doc) not random shuffle.
3. LEval Exam gsm100: one 4.2k-token prefill serves 100 queries (instructions only change).
4. LEval codeU/narrative_qa/legal: plan for 25k–55k token contexts; little cross-row reuse.
5. Decode: cap max_new_tokens low on Exam; Generation subsets need higher caps (summaries).
